preconditions: User should be able to log in properly and navigate to home page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home
Clicking Home or Arrow Back controls from login page navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login page loads and UI elements are visible
steps: Verify User Name textbox is visible
Verify characters entered into Password field are masked
Verify SIGN IN button is visible
Verify Arrow Back control is visible
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads without error and displays User Name textbox, Password masked input field, SIGN IN button, Home control, and Arrow Back control. The browser URL remains http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Successful login using valid credentials with SIGN IN button
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home. The home page content is displayed and the login page is no longer visible.

testCases.title: Successful login using Enter key from password field
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
Press Enter while focus is inside the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: User authentication succeeds and the browser redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home with the home page interface visible.

testCases.title: Login fails with incorrect password
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter WrongPassword123 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected. A visible login failure message indicating incorrect username or password appears and the browser remains on the login page URL.

testCases.title: Login fails with incorrect username
steps: Enter wronguser in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and an observable error message indicating invalid username or password is displayed while the browser remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login fails when both username and password are blank
testCases.expectedResult: Login is blocked. Required field validation indicators appear for both User Name and Password fields and the browser remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login fails when username is blank
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Submission is rejected with a visible validation message indicating User Name is required and the page remains on the login screen.

testCases.title: Login fails when password is blank
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
testCases.expectedResult: Submission is rejected with a visible validation message indicating Password is required and the login page remains displayed.

testCases.title: Password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Each typed character in the Password field appears as a masked symbol such as dots or asterisks instead of displaying the actual characters.

testCases.title: Navigation using Home control from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page UI becomes visible.

testCases.title: Navigation using Arrow Back control from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Browser redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page content loads successfully.

testCases.title: Login with leading and trailing spaces in username
steps: Enter '  haklarr  ' in the User Name field including leading and trailing spaces
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: System trims leading and trailing spaces from the username before authentication and successfully redirects the user to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Login attempt with whitespace-only username
steps: Enter multiple spaces in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: System treats the username as empty and displays a required-field validation for User Name while remaining on the login page.

testCases.title: Login attempt with whitespace-only password
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter multiple spaces in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and a validation or login failure message appears while the browser remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login attempt with excessively long username input
steps: Enter a username string longer than 200 characters in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Application does not crash or break UI layout. Authentication fails and an error message is shown while the user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Login attempt with special characters in username
steps: Enter user!@# in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and a visible login error message appears while the page remains on the login screen.

testCases.title: Repeated clicking of SIGN IN button during login attempt
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication process is executed and the browser performs a single redirect to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate navigation or UI errors.

testCases.title: Login attempt with correct username but wrong case password
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails due to password case sensitivity. An invalid credential message appears and the browser remains on the login page.
